privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create three Cost Centers in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus: 1. Name: 'Engineering CC', Code: 'CC-ENG-01', Department: 'Engineering'. 2. Name: 'Sales CC', Code: 'CC-SAL-01', Department: 'Sales'. 3. Name: 'Marketing CC', Code: 'CC-MKT-01', Department: 'Marketing'.
